title: Spyglass night vision mode
description: toggleable night vison mode for spyglasses
body:
pressing N (changeable in settings) while useing a Spyglass toggles a nightvison mode. (doesnt work if you already have nightvision)

I made this mod so i can use it with this one: [Night Constantly](https://modrinth.com/mod/night-constantly)

my modrinth profile [auiki](https://modrinth.com/user/auikiouy)

If you have suggestions, questions or something of the like, my discord is auiki

(made with Mcreator)
